segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a vibrant, whimsical scene featuring large, cartoonish frog-like sculptures in pink, orange, and green against a bright turquoise backdrop. This playful visual quickly transitions to an outdoor game setup on a sunny day, where a group of participants in matching blue uniforms are gathered around a table adorned with red roses and white pillars, under a branded '安慕希' (Anmushi) umbrella. An upbeat, game-show-like background music plays as a male announcer's voice introduces a 'trash talk' segment, explaining that the fiercest boaster gets to attack first. A male participant, likely the 'Man with Blindfold' who is seen holding a blue foam baton, confidently boasts in Chinese, 'After you hit me, I might become even harder to become famous than Bai Jingting,' which is met with laughter, applause, and an 'Ohhh!' from the group. The 'Blonde Woman,' actively participating, adds, 'Thank you for promoting us,' followed by another male participant's self-deprecating joke, 'I don't have any works recently,' drawing more laughter and cheers. The setting then shifts to a more urban, alley-like environment with brick walls and greenery, where the group is now seated behind a red rope barrier. The announcer's voice introduces the '5人组挑战' (5-person team challenge), instructing them to 'Please give your complaints about the production team,' a question also displayed as on-screen text. The group reacts with gasps and laughter, and a female voice, possibly the Blonde Woman, exclaims, 'He wins, he wins, he wins!' The announcer then specifically calls on 'Gao Hanyu,' who reacts with 'How should I put this?' Other male participants offer humorous 'complaints,' such as 'It's a hot day, sitting here,' and a playful jab about 'Yao Yitian having too many fans.' Another male participant, possibly the 'Man with Glasses,' humorously challenges one of the 'complaints,' asking, 'Is this a complaint? It's clear you want to come back for season 13, bro,' leading to more laughter and an 'Ohhh!' from the lively and competitive group. Throughout, the participants display a range of emotions—smiling, laughing, and concentrating—maintaining an energetic, humorous, and game-show-like atmosphere focused on teamwork and playful competition.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with an upbeat game show theme, setting a lively outdoor scene adorned with colorful frog sculptures and '安慕希' (Anmushi) branding. Participants in matching blue uniforms are gathered, reacting with laughter and anticipation. A male voice immediately kicks off a quiz, asking '请说出可以来跑男录制的嘉宾' (Please name a guest who could appear on Running Man), suggesting '彭昱晏' (Peng Yuyan). Another male voice, likely the Man with Dark Hair, quickly follows with '丁程鑫' (Ding Chengxin), while a third male voice, possibly the Man with Glasses, suggests '汤姆克鲁斯' (Tom Cruise). Laughter erupts as a male voice emphatically states '必须请' (Must invite), followed by more suggestions like '沈月' (Shen Yue) and '宋亚轩' (Song Yaxuan) from various male participants. A lively debate ensues among the male voices, questioning '那不一定，宋亚轩他不一定能请得来吧？啊？' (That's not certain, Song Yaxuan might not be able to come, right? Huh?) and '他在别的节目上嘛！' (He's on another show!), met with more laughter. The Man with Blindfold, initially focused, is at the center of the action. The Blonde Woman, holding a blue foam baton, excitedly names '白敬亭' (Bai Jingting), while other male voices continue to shout out names like '刘耀文' (Liu Yaowen), '刘德华' (Andy Lau), and '严浩翔' (Yan Haoxiang). The debate intensifies with '真不一定哦' (That's not certain, oh) and '他确实他在别台呢' (He's actually on another channel), leading to a declaration of '回答错误' (wrong answer). The scene culminates in a burst of exaggerated comedic screams and sound effects as the Man with Blindfold is hit and falls backward, adding a hilarious climax. A male voice shouts '张世远, Out!', followed by more intense comedic screams and laughter. The Blonde Woman raises her arms triumphantly, and the Man with Glasses smiles broadly, celebrating the outcome. The segment concludes with a male voice cheering '要挡威武!' (Yao Dang Wei Wu!), as on-screen text clarifies the events are for program effect and welcomes members of the '时代少年团' (Time Youth Group), all under bright natural daylight and vibrant set decorations.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens in a vibrant outdoor game setting, marked by a red rope barrier and branded elements like '安慕希' and '多冒昧' on blue signs, all set against brick walls and greenery, creating a lively game-show atmosphere with light background music. A male host's voice initiates the trivia challenge, asking "请说出带花的歌词" (Please say a lyric containing the word 'flower'), echoing the on-screen text. Two participants, Gao Lu Na, with dark hair in a braid and wearing a blue uniform, and Zheng Kai, also in a blue uniform, engage in the word-based challenge. Gao Lu Na, initially crouched, reacts with animated expressions, struggling playfully to recall lyrics, saying "我不会唱" (I can't sing) before attempting to sing "花花世界" with a dramatic flourish, earning a "正确" (Correct) from the host. Zheng Kai, standing focused, confidently sings "春天花会开, 鸟儿自在" and later "女人花," prompting the host to praise him as a "中华小曲库" (Chinese song library). The dynamic camera work captures their close-up expressions and wider interactions, punctuated by game show sound effects and laughter. A male voice explains that there are two types of dipping sauce, "有一份的蘸水是有折耳根，有一份是没有折耳根" (one with Houttuynia cordata, one without). The woman decides, "那我尝尝折耳根吧" (Then I'll try the Houttuynia cordata one), and uses chopsticks to add ingredients from a dipping sauce labeled '蘸水' into her bowl, asking for "多放一点" (a bit more). After a dramatic musical flourish, she takes a bite, showing visible enjoyment, exclaiming "嗯！好香啊！好好吃啊！" (Mm! So fragrant! So delicious!) and "真命！就好好吃啊！" (Truly! It's just so delicious!). Animated graphics, including a devilish face and flowers, appear to emphasize her reactions. The camera zooms in on a bowl of '糊辣椒' (a spicy chili paste with green onions and garlic), as the male voice explains, "而且它里面的辣椒是糊辣椒，就辣椒炒过有点干干的，焦焦的，然后把它捣碎了，所以是贵州的当地特色" (And the chili inside is 'hú là jiāo', the chili is stir-fried until a bit dry and charred, then pounded, so it's a local specialty of Guizhou). The woman exclaims "哇！" (Wow!) in response. The male voice continues, mentioning, "之前周深特别特别推荐，我们贵州的干辣椒真的是..." (Previously, Zhou Shen especially, especially recommended it, our Guizhou dried chili is truly...). A circular inset appears showing a man’s face with the text '绝了' (amazing), suggesting his approval. The woman continues eating with evident pleasure, letting out another satisfied "嗯！". The atmosphere is warm and inviting, with soft lighting and a striped red-and-white background, enhancing the cozy dining experience, capturing the sensory delight of the meal.

The Man in White Robe with Gray Patterns, identified as Zheng Kai or 'Kai Ge', struggles dramatically, his face smeared with white powder, attempting to eat biscuits from a tray. His exaggerated efforts are met with a chorus of laughter and comments like '凯哥真的下不去' (Brother Kai really can't get it down) and '凯哥咱要不那个咬一个起来' (Brother Kai, why don't we bite one up?), along with comedic 'boing' sound effects. segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens in a traditional Chinese-style indoor setting with dark wooden architecture, red carpeting, and ornate patterned backdrops, accompanied by upbeat, traditional Chinese-style music. Two blindfolded participants, Zhou Shen (Man in White Robe with Gray Patterns) and Sha Yi (Participant in Black Robe with Red Embroidery), are lying face-down on low tables, attempting to eat small biscuits using only their foreheads. The Host in Black Robe with Red Embroidery, seated centrally, initiates the challenge with a spoken "开大跨" (open wide) and provides humorous commentary throughout, smiling and clapping. Zhou Shen, with a white blindfold, struggles comically, his face covered in white powder, making grunting sounds and eventually exclaiming "我可以" (I can) as he succeeds, prompting laughter from the Man in Gray Robe who gestures with amusement and comments "你的手, 你的手" (your hand, your hand). Sha Yi, wearing a red-trimmed black robe and a red blindfold, also attempts the challenge with visible effort, accompanied by more laughter and the host's playful "别动" (don't move). The host further teases Sha Yi, remarking "沙哥, 叼了起不来了" (Brother Sha, you picked it up but can't get up) and "太远了" (too far), to which Sha Yi humorously responds "这不, 我都, 我都躺下了" (I'm already lying down). On-screen text displays scores '周深: 4块' (Zhou Shen: 4 pieces) and '沙溢: 1块' (Sha Yi: 1 piece). The host continues with witty observations like "沙哥和饼干的距离是一个银河的距离" (The distance between Brother Sha and the biscuit is the distance of a galaxy) and "自己把自己笑倒了" (he laughed himself over). Sha Yi eventually gives up, saying "算了, 我们不要了" (forget it, we don't want it) and "这个比爬那个还累" (this is even more tiring than climbing that), while a female voice is heard suggesting "我跟深哥比一下" (I'll compare with Brother Shen). The segment concludes with Zhou Shen celebrating his victory, while Sha Yi gives up, and the host and audience react with joy, as on-screen text displays '友好鞠躬' (friendly bow) and '胜' (win), emphasizing the lighthearted and comedic atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene opens in a dimly lit, ornate traditional Chinese room where four participants in robes are seated around a central table. The Man in Black Robe with Red Embroidery, acting as host, sits centrally, flanked by the Man in Gray Robe and the Man in White Robe with Gray Patterns. The Man with Dark Hair, in a white robe, is initially seen bowing dramatically. A female voice, identified as Zhang Ruonan, excitedly declares, "我知道谁是荆轲了," and "中了！嗯，真的就中了！," explaining, "刚刚那个茶摊的老板娘告诉我的." A male voice firmly responds, "不可能," adding, "我也是拿过玉佩的人," and "我知道线索怎么给." Zhang Ruonan, wearing a gray robe and black vest, enters the scene holding a black scroll-like object, walking purposefully through a stone-paved courtyard with traditional architecture. She approaches the group, engaging in conversation, as the on-screen text '试探' (testing) appears. The Man in White Robe with Gray Patterns smiles, while the Man in Gray Robe laughs heartily. Zhang Ruonan's confident voice returns, "有的人最贪牌吧," followed by suspenseful music. She then states, "我知道是谁了." Dramatic, intense music builds as the Man in Black Robe gestures and speaks, while Zhang Ruonan listens intently. A male voice analyzes, "他一直在用眼神扰乱你的思绪." The scene cuts to a wide shot of the ancient courtyard with stone buildings and a horse-drawn carriage, as suspenseful music continues, punctuated by a resonant gong. The group continues their interaction, with the Man in White Robe with Gray Patterns leaning in to whisper to Zhang Ruonan. segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in an ornately decorated room with dark, patterned walls, where a group in traditional Chinese attire is seated around a low wooden table. On-screen text '人数多的阵营 拥有投票决定权' (The larger group has voting power) sets the stage for a strategic game. A male voice suggests, "Let Zhou Shen go," followed by another confirming, "Yes, I'll vote for Zhou Shen," as they conclude their discussion. The lively interaction continues with a female voice exclaiming "Impossible!" while the Man in White Robe with Gray Patterns gestures expressively. The Man in Gray Robe adds, "Whatever you two say is useless," confirming a "three to two" count, and the Man in Black Robe with Red Embroidery laughs heartily, clapping his hands. A female voice playfully asks, "Is it useful if we say Amuxi is especially delicious?" to which a male voice emphatically replies, "This should be said," followed by laughter. Another male voice declares, "Won all the games," and a second laments, "Know everything here, just can't get through." The Woman with Dark Hair (Zhang Ruonan) playfully interjects, "Shut up, my lord," eliciting more laughter. The host, the Man in Black Robe, continues, "If the one who comes later is still one of us, then you two will still be there," prompting more amusement. Zhang Ruonan comments, "Drawing a circle on the ground to imprison oneself is nothing more than this," as a male voice clarifies, "What we're playing today is an imprisonment game." The host then points out, "Ruonan and Zhou Shen, imprisoned here, want to run." The scene transitions to an exterior shot of the '水阳驿馆' (Shuiyang Post Station), a traditional Chinese building, as dramatic, traditional instrumental music begins to build suspense. Zhang Ruonan and the Man with Dark Hair are seen entering. On-screen text announces '使臣薛凯琪 到达水阳驿馆' (Envoy Xue Kaiqi arrives at Shuiyang Post Station), and Zhang Ruonan utters "Kaiqi ah." Back inside, the dramatic music continues with a percussive flourish as Zhang Ruonan stands and speaks, while the Man in White Robe listens intently, occasionally adjusting his hair. A female voice observes, "So you guys switched," and another demands, "Now reveal your identity." The segment concludes with a female voice stating, "I really don't want to," hinting at a difficult choice.
